title: Senior Financial Analyst - S.R. Batliboi - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - S.R. Batliboi - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
S.R. Batliboi is actively seeking a talented and motivated Senior Financial Analyst to join our dynamic team in Srinagar. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About S.R. Batliboi:
S.R. Batliboi is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with S.R. Batliboi!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
